zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，等待方向突破
zh.content:
当前比特币维持窄幅整理，价格运行于76700美元附近，24小时波动有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。由于价格仍低于20日均线，短线结构偏空，反弹力度暂未形成有效延续。

从技术指标看，MACD维持负值，说明空头动能仍占优势，中短周期存在回调压力。20日均线位于77129附近，已转化为上方关键压制区域，若无法重新站稳，行情仍可能继续弱势震荡。RSI数据缺失，但从价格表现看，多头动能明显不足。

支撑方面，76650附近为当前第一支撑，若跌破，后续可能测试76400至76200区域；上方阻力则集中在76830及77100一线。只有放量突破20日均线，市场才有机会重新打开上行空间并修复短线趋势。

操作上，激进交易者可关注区间突破机会，短线以高抛低吸为主。若价格无法突破77100，建议控制仓位并谨慎追多；稳健投资者则可等待回踩关键支撑后的企稳信号，再考虑分批布局多单。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin continues to trade under mild short-term pressure, with BTC/USD hovering near 76,763 after failing to reclaim the 77,100 region marked by the 20-day simple moving average. Price action remains compressed within a narrow intraday range, suggesting hesitation among both buyers and sellers. The slight negative daily change reflects weakening momentum rather than aggressive liquidation, although the inability to sustain rebounds above nearby resistance keeps the broader short-term structure cautiously bearish.

The technical backdrop leans moderately negative as the MACD remains below zero at -102.99, indicating fading upside momentum and a continuation of bearish divergence from recent highs. While the RSI reading is unavailable, current price behavior beneath the SMA(20) implies momentum remains soft. The market appears to be consolidating after previous gains, with traders closely monitoring whether Bitcoin can stabilize above the 76,600 zone before another directional move develops.

Key support is forming around 76,650, closely aligned with the session low near 76,664. A decisive break below this area could expose downside potential toward 76,200 and possibly 75,800 if selling accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near 77,100 to 77,150, where the SMA(20) currently acts as a dynamic ceiling. A stronger breakout above 77,300 would improve sentiment and could reopen a path toward the 78,000 psychological barrier.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation before entering new positions. Short-term traders could favor range-based strategies while volatility remains compressed, buying near support and reducing exposure near resistance. Momentum traders may look for a confirmed move above the 20-day average before considering bullish continuation setups. Conversely, a sustained breakdown beneath 76,600 may favor short positions, particularly if accompanied by rising volume and broader weakness across crypto markets.
